query: SELECT service, CONCAT(LEFT(apiKey, 10), '...', RIGHT(apiKey, 6)) as masked_key, isActive FROM creator_api_keys WHERE service = 'elevenlabs'
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4JLMmhcj7UPMoCG.e54b35e04dec --database VYneUcnZvTL9FVkbHuDg6r --execute SELECT service, CONCAT(LEFT(apiKey, 10), '...', RIGHT(apiKey, 6)) as masked_key, isActive FROM creator_api_keys WHERE service = 'elevenlabs'
